title: polygala capillifolia
intro: Polygala capillifolia, also known as Prune d'enfer or Chinese senega, is a plant species that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala capillifolia include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cardiovascular health. Polygala capillifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
